title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: After logging out, the "Share Data" toggle incorrectly reappears in app settings instead of remaining hidden as it does after logging in with Poly credentials.
steps: Open the app and navigate to Settings.
Check if the 'Share Data' toggle is still visible in Settings.
Check if the 'Share Data' toggle reappears in Settings.
expected: After logging in with Poly credentials, the Share Data toggle should no longer be visible in Settings.
